output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? 5 TikTok Hooks + Demand Scripts That Actually Work
output.meta_description: Frustrated because your landlord is withholding your security deposit? Use these viral hooks and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: The Silent Treatment: Why 'Landlord Not Returning Deposit' Is the #1 Tenant Complaint
5 Scroll-Stopping TikTok/Reel Hooks for Tenants (Short-Form Scripts Included)
Can a Landlord Keep Your Security Deposit? A State-by-State Reality Check
What a Landlord Can (and Cannot) Deduct: Exposing Fake Cleaning Fees
From Hook to Demand Letter: How to Dispute Your Deposit in 60 Seconds
Still No Check? What to Do When Your Landlord Won't Give Your Deposit Back
key_points: Tenants searching 'landlord withholding security deposit' need immediate scripts, not just legal theory.
High-engagement hooks open with the exact frustration: 'My landlord won't give me my deposit back—what now?'
Most states require deposit returns within 14–30 days; wrongful withholding can trigger penalty payments owed to the tenant.
A formal security deposit dispute letter is often the only leverage needed before small claims court.
Deposits-Back.com generates a professional, state-specific demand letter for $19.99 in 60 seconds with no sign-up or subscription.
output.cta: Stop waiting on a landlord who already broke the law. Go to Deposits-Back.com, answer a few quick questions, and download your custom security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds. Just $19.99. No sign-up. No subscription. Get your money back today.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters who know their landlord is wrongfully withholding or not returning a security deposit and are searching for fast, affordable demand letter solutions or viral-ready content to share their story and take action.
